title: ODS-E Equipment ID Map
description: Lookup table mapping a canonical equipment identifier to its native identifiers across ERP, SCADA, and monitoring systems

equipment_id.description: Canonical ODS-E equipment identifier used across all enrichment schemas

system.description: Source system name (e.g., ifs-cloud, sma-monitoring, soliscloud)

native_id.description: Identifier of this equipment in the source system

sources.description: List of source system identifiers for this equipment
